# LaserPay

> LaserPay is a Banking & Payment Technology Engineering company that helps Banks, FinTechs, NBFCs, Payment Aggregators, Payment Gateways, and Enterprises design, build, integrate, launch, and scale digital payment and banking solutions.

LaserPay is not a general software or IT company — it specializes exclusively in banking and payments technology, covering everything from API integrations with banks and payment networks to end-to-end platform development, compliance consulting, certification support, and managed technology services. LaserPay is a technology and consulting partner — not a bank, Payment Aggregator, Payment Gateway, or licensed financial entity — and works alongside the licensed institutions in this ecosystem.

## Services

- [Payment Platform Development](https://www.laserpay.in/service-payment-platforms.html): Payment gateways, payment aggregation, orchestration, wallets, UPI, BBPS, escrow, collections, disbursements
- [Banking Solutions](https://www.laserpay.in/service-banking-solutions.html): Internet and mobile banking, digital onboarding, video KYC, corporate banking, digital lending, loan origination
- [API Integrations](https://www.laserpay.in/service-api-integrations.html): Integrations with banks, NPCI, Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, CBS, AML, CKYC, DigiLocker, Aadhaar, UPI, NACH, FASTag, AEPS and more
- [Merchant Enablement](https://www.laserpay.in/service-merchant-enablement.html): Merchant onboarding, PG/PA selection, bank introductions, compliance, certification, go-live support
- [Banking Consulting](https://www.laserpay.in/service-banking-consulting.html): Payment Aggregator licensing guidance, acquiring bank selection, settlement models, RBI compliance guidance
- [Managed Technology Services](https://www.laserpay.in/service-managed-services.html): 24x7 monitoring, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, security, API monitoring, AMC support

## Learn (Payment & Banking Ecosystem Education)

- [Learn Hub](https://www.laserpay.in/learn.html): Full index of LaserPay's educational articles on how the payments and banking ecosystem works
- [Payment Gateway vs. Payment Aggregator](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-payment-gateway-vs-aggregator.html): The difference between the two roles, who holds funds, and how Indian regulation treats them
- [How UPI Works](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-how-upi-works.html): NPCI, PSPs, VPAs, and the UPI transaction flow explained
- [NPCI and India's Payment Rails](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-npci-payment-rails.html): UPI, IMPS, NACH, FASTag, AEPS, BBPS, and RuPay explained
- [Payment Aggregator Licensing in India](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-payment-aggregator-license-india.html): A general educational overview of the RBI PA/PG regulatory framework (not legal advice)
- [Settlement Models and Escrow Accounts](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-settlement-escrow-models.html): How settlement cycles, escrow, and nodal accounts work
- [ISO 8583 vs. ISO 20022](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-iso8583-vs-iso20022.html): Payment messaging standards compared
- [KYC, Video KYC, and CKYC](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-kyc-video-kyc-ckyc.html): Digital customer onboarding explained
- [Payment Orchestration](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-payment-orchestration.html): What it is and why multi-gateway routing matters
- [Core Banking Systems (CBS) and API Banking](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-core-banking-api-banking.html): How banks expose core systems through APIs
- [Choosing an Acquiring Bank or PSP](https://www.laserpay.in/learn-choosing-acquiring-bank-psp.html): A practical evaluation guide
- [Payment & Banking Glossary](https://www.laserpay.in/glossary.html): Short definitions of UPI, NPCI, BBPS, NACH, AEPS, FASTag, CKYC, KYC, AML, PA, PG, ISO 8583, ISO 20022, CBS, NBFC, PSP, RBI, RuPay, SLA, and more

## Company

- [Services Overview](https://www.laserpay.in/services.html): Full service portfolio hub page
